analysis: same-device ultrasound treatment plus finite-frequency inverse and source-encoded linear RTM monitoring
simulation_type: RITK-loaded CT/NIfTI, kwavers PyO3 theranostic inverse

brain_scene.name: rire_ct_aligned_vim_like_scene

target.name: vim_like_atlas_coordinate_resolved_to_ct_brain_support
target.source_frame: MNI152 2009c atlas coordinate mapped once into CT brain-support fractions

brain_scene.invariant: target_fraction_xyz resolves against the CT-derived brain support on each simulation lattice; transducer coordinates are generated from this single pose block and expressed relative to that target.

controlled_linear_nonlinear_comparison.comparison_contract: linear and nonlinear outputs are physically resampled to the full-resolution controlled CT placement grid before metrics, archived fields, and display

summary.dominant_observation: the matched comparison does not isolate one dominant divergence source

cases.technical_explanation: On the full CT placement grid, linear fusion Dice is 0.000 and nonlinear fusion Dice is 0.740. Nonlinear target MI is 20.91 at 16.86 MPa; outside-target energy is 0.793, linear/nonlinear fusion Pearson is 0.196, and nonlinear FWI objective drop is 6.193e-01. The Rayleigh-Plesset source and passive reconstruction hotspots are 2.83 and 19.24 grid cells from the target centroid. The residual projected aperture mismatch from the original runs is 99.35 mm; therefore the matched artifact localizes the remaining channel difference to nonlinear pressure/cavitation spread plus residual 2-D-vs-3-D aperture mismatch, not to image resolution alone.

On the full CT placement grid, linear fusion Dice is 0.680 and nonlinear fusion Dice is 0.259. Nonlinear target MI is 2.97 at 2.10 MPa; outside-target energy is 0.916, linear/nonlinear fusion Pearson is 0.207, and nonlinear FWI objective drop is 0.000e+00. The Rayleigh-Plesset source and passive reconstruction hotspots are 10.58 and 5.23 grid cells from the target centroid. The residual projected aperture mismatch from the original runs is 148.00 mm; therefore the matched artifact localizes the remaining channel difference to nonlinear pressure/cavitation spread plus residual 2-D-vs-3-D aperture mismatch, not to image resolution alone.

On the full CT placement grid, linear fusion Dice is 0.228 and nonlinear fusion Dice is 0.585. Nonlinear target MI is 2.46 at 1.74 MPa; outside-target energy is 0.966, linear/nonlinear fusion Pearson is 0.440, and nonlinear FWI objective drop is 2.988e-06. The Rayleigh-Plesset source and passive reconstruction hotspots are 65.06 and 65.06 grid cells from the target centroid. The residual projected aperture mismatch from the original runs is 49.29 mm; therefore the matched artifact localizes the remaining channel difference to nonlinear pressure/cavitation spread plus residual 2-D-vs-3-D aperture mismatch, not to image resolution alone.
